comment: internal — the 250 MHz pipeline metronome. A free-running counter emitting one edge strobe per powered tick; pipeline modules fire on INTERNAL_EDGE. A SEPARATE oscillator from MAC (125 MHz) and from the TAI timebase. Same-domain reads need no CDC.

config_nodes.name: INTERNAL_POWER
config_nodes.comment: power bit: counter self-runs while bit0 = 1 (set once by starter)

config_nodes.name: INTERNAL_RUN_UNTIL
config_nodes.comment: configured self-run stop count (set once by starter)

dff_nodes.name: INTERNAL_CYCLE
dff_nodes.comment: free-running 250 MHz cycle count; += 1 per powered tick

dff_nodes.name: INTERNAL_EDGE
dff_nodes.comment: pipeline metronome edge: 1 every powered tick
